references.title: Footprints at School: Modelling In-class Social Dynamics from Students’ Physical Positioning Traces

annotations.text: Position Tracking is a potentially useful source of educational data. The paper explores how using physical positioning data can be used for Social Network Analysis purposes. Authors perform an analyzis on primary school data (98 students and 6 teachers) across 8 weeks.
Results show that position can helpo identify which pedagogical approaches promote in-class interactions or isolated students.
